Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The European AllSky7 fireball network 101 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL 123 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 943 upvotes, 195 comments
  4. DOOM Over DNS 331 upvotes, 87 comments
  5. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 300 upvotes, 88 comments
  6. QRV Operating System: QNX on RISC-V 41 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 926 upvotes, 320 comments
  9. Local Bernstein theory, and lower bounds for Lebesgue constants 36 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack 413 upvotes, 152 comments
  11. HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents 224 upvotes, 78 comments
  12. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS Certificate on a Brother Printer with Certbot 61 upvotes, 16 comments
  13. Desk for people who work at home with a cat 47 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. How and why to take a logarithm of an image [video] 109 upvotes, 41 comments
  15. $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks 423 upvotes, 231 comments
  16. A Faster Alternative to Jq 288 upvotes, 174 comments
  17. Gzip decompression in 250 lines of Rust 42 upvotes, 18 comments
  18. Anatomy of the .claude/ Folder 112 upvotes, 62 comments
  19. EMachines never obsolete PCs: More than a meme 17 upvotes, 6 comments
  20. The 'paperwork flood': How I drowned a bureaucrat before dinner 372 upvotes, 281 comments
  21. The Last Gasps of the Rent Seeking Class 13 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Hold on to Your Hardware 399 upvotes, 333 comments
  23. SimpleX Chat 12 upvotes, 4 comments
  24. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 85 upvotes, 60 comments
  25. Schedule tasks on the web 237 upvotes, 200 comments
  26. Apple discontinues the Mac Pro 561 upvotes, 515 comments
  27. Sand from Different Beaches in the World 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year 239 upvotes, 217 comments
  29. Hong Kong Police Can Now Demand Phone Passwords Under New Security Rules 95 upvotes, 89 comments
  30. Rank the 50 best Apple products 29 upvotes, 24 comments

Last generated 12:30am, 28 March 2026. Source here.
